sentences.text: Hey Robyn, this is Josh over at red bull. I'm just following up from my emails and they asked me about pricing. Your call has been answered by a via IP office extension three eight zero five is not available to leave a message wait for the tone when finished recording press pound for more options. Otherwise for assistance press zero. Now record at the tone.
